name: Kuo Fan Gee Chiu B1
recipeIngredient: 2 Dry chilis, cut in half and soaked in warm water for 10 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone chicken breasts and cut into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Place chicken in Marinade and toss to coat. Marinate for 15 minutes in the refrigerator.
3. Before stir-frying, add 1 tablespoon oil to the chicken mixture and mix well.
4. Heat 1 cup oil to 375°F in wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Remove and drain well.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in wok or skillet over high heat. Add chilis; fry until golden brown. Add garlic, scallion, bamboo shoots, and straw mushrooms. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add chicken and stir in Seasoning Sauce. Cook, stirring constantly until sauce thickens. Serve hot.
